economic_notes: First Nation has 20% interest in Énergie Renouvelable Onimiki S.E.C. (renewable energy). Temiscaming Power Dam and Bridge projects active. Forestry operations ongoing. Acquiring new administrative building for approximately $1 million subsequent to year end. Subsidiaries: Anishnabek Outfitting Inc. (100%) and 2748-6794 Québec Inc. (100%). MDC (Mahingan Development Corporation) wholly owned but accounted for by modified equity method, a departure from PSAS.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for three reasons: (1) inability to observe physical inventory count of Anishnabek Outfitting Inc.; (2) Mahingan Development Corporation (MDC) not consolidated as required by PSAS, accounted for by modified equity method instead; (3) PS3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not applied. Province identified as QC based on auditor location (Amos, Québec) and program funders (FNEC, FNQLHSSC, FNHRDCQ, Transport Québec). No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text. No long-term debt reported. Human Resources Development expenses ($239,086) and Other expenses ($194,630) do not map directly to standard categories. OSR estimated as total revenue minus identified government transfers (ISC, FNEC, FNQLHSSC, FNHRDCQ, Ministère des Forêts, Transport Québec, Secrétariat aux Relations avec les Premières Nations). total_government_transfers calculated as sum of ISC $1,535,773 + FNEC $258,328 + FNQLHSSC $372,078 + ISC Health refundable surplus -$4,580 + FNHRDCQ $293,936 + Ministère des Forêts $10,000 + Transport Québec $324,146 + Secrétariat $102,117 = $2,891,798 plus deferred revenue net adjustment included in revenue presentation. Deferred revenue net change included in revenue lines making OSR calculation approximate.
